comment: Archie's reader drops into any web page as a single <archie-viewer> custom element — no framework, no build step on the host.
_showoff: Box the embed framed inside the host page chrome.

comment: Point it at a published library by URL, or at a local .archie.zip to browse exhibits with no internet at all.
_showoff: Two attributes; mention the offline path.

comment: Deep-zoom still works inside the embed; tiles stream on demand.
A pre-baked DZI pyramid streams tiles straight to the canvas; a bare source string auto-detects the right tile handler — IIIF, DZI, or plain image.
_showoff: Mount internal; the auto-detect is the 'mount creator passes a source string' story.

comment: Malformed or empty region selectors are skipped safely — a broken box never breaks the read.
_showoff: Mount internal; invisible robustness worth a callout.

comment: Multiple embeds on one page stay independent — each tag carries its own library.
_showoff: Capture two embeds side by side to show it.
